title: Stilton and Tandoori Crispy Naan Bites
description: Crispy naan bites filled with melted stilton cheese and spiced tandoori chicken.
instructions: Cut the naan bread into triangles.
In a bowl, mix together the tandoori chicken, stilton cheese, crisp, butter, cilantro, salt, black pepper, and garam masala.
Place a spoonful of the chicken mixture onto each naan triangle.
Fold the naan in half to form a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Place the naan bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the naan is crispy and golden brown.
Optional: Serve with a side of mint chutney for added flavor.
